title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, taught by David J. Malan. It is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with accompanying communities on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other social platforms.
writeup: Carter Zenke addresses how to get started with CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming taught by David J. Malan. The video covers the multiple ways the course is offered, including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. It also points to the accompanying communities on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms for support.
